scripts.docker:build:slow: for service in authentication ot-client-interface gateway profile social project-planning assets forgeofwill-client-interface chat-collector prompt-proxy ai-orchestration telos-docs-service blogging crdn-client-interface digital-homestead-client-interface hai-client-interface fin-commander marketing-generator permissions owner-console store store-client app-configurator configurable-client forum d6 wellness classifieds payments finance local-hub-client-interface leads-app lead-tracker system-configurator system-configurator-api videos video-client; do docker compose build $service; done

scripts.docker:infra:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d postgres redis db-setup
scripts.docker:infra:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml logs -f postgres redis db-setup
scripts.docker:infra:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml stop postgres redis db-setup
scripts.docker:dev: pnpm run build:docker:dev && pnpm run docker:build:dev && pnpm run docker:dev:up
scripts.docker:dev:bootstrap: pnpm run docker:dev && pnpm run docker:dev:seed
scripts.docker:dev:reset: pnpm run build:docker:dev && pnpm run docker:build:dev && ./scripts/docker-start-phased.sh 5 --force-recreate --renew-anon-volumes
scripts.docker:prod:bootstrap: docker compose up -d --force-recreate && pnpm run docker:prod:seed
scripts.fow:docker:dev: docker compose -f fow.docker-compose.yaml -f fow.docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d --force-recreate --renew-anon-volumes && docker compose exec telos-docs-service node /usr/src/app/seed-persona.js
scripts.docker:dev:watch: pnpm run build:docker:dev && pnpm run docker:dev:up && pnpm run watch:docker:dev
scripts.packages:test: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm exec nx run-many --target=test --projects=billing-contracts,billing-sdk,app-catalog-contracts --outputStyle=static
scripts.packages:build: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm exec nx run-many --target=build --projects=billing-contracts,billing-sdk,app-catalog-contracts --outputStyle=static
